BridgePort.Name: Bridge Port
BridgePort.Hint: The port the MCP server is listening on. Must match BRIDGE_PORT in your MCP server configuration.

BridgeHost.Name: Bridge Host
BridgeHost.Hint: The hostname where the MCP server is running. Use 'localhost' for local installations.

Errors.GMOnly: The Foundry MCP Bridge module only operates for GM users.
Errors.ConnectionFailed: MCP Bridge: Failed to connect to server at {url}. Is the MCP server running?
